label: namecode - DUMBBELL.NEBULA | 85.600
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by M27: The Dumbbell Nebula. Is this what will become of our Sun? Quite possibly.  The first hint of our Sun's future was discovered inadvertently in 1764. At that time, Charles Messier was compiling a list of diffuse objects Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
